sentences.sentence: Ecotourism is often regarded as a form of nature-based tourism and has become an important alternative source of tourists.
sentences.translation: 生态旅游常被视为一种以自然为基础的旅游形式，已成为吸引游客的重要替代资源。

structure.text: Ecotourism
is often regarded as a form of nature-based tourism
as a form of nature-based tourism
and has become an important alternative source of tourists

difficult_points: is regarded as 和 has become 是由 and 连接、共用主语 Ecotourism 的并列谓语。
an important alternative source of tourists 指生态旅游作为吸引游客的重要替代资源。

sentences.sentence: In addition to providing the traditional resort-leisure product, it has been argued that ecotourism resort management should have a particular focus on best-practice environmental management. an educational and interpretive component, and direct anil indirect contributions to the conservation of the natural and cultural environment (Ayala. I996).
sentences.translation: 有观点认为，生态旅游度假村的管理除了提供传统的度假休闲产品外，还应特别注重最佳环境管理实践、教育与讲解功能，以及对自然和文化环境保护的直接与间接贡献（Ayala，1996）。

structure.text: In addition to providing the traditional resort-leisure product
providing the traditional resort-leisure product
it has been argued

that ecotourism resort management should have a particular focus on best-practice environmental management. an educational and interpretive component, and direct anil indirect contributions to the conservation of the natural and cultural environment
ecotourism resort management
should have a particular focus on best-practice environmental management
an educational and interpretive component
and direct anil indirect contributions to the conservation of the natural and cultural environment
to the conservation of the natural and cultural environment
(Ayala. I996)

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正的内容是 that 引导的宾语从句。
should have a particular focus on 后并列三项内容：best-practice environmental management、an educational and interpretive component 和 direct and indirect contributions to...，原文因转录问题误用句号分隔，需按并列关系理解。
(Ayala. I996) 是文献引用标注，说明该观点的出处。

sentences.sentence: Conran Cove Island Resort is a large integrated ecotourism-based resort located south of Brisbane on the Gold Coast, Queensland. Australia.
sentences.translation: 科兰湾岛度假村（Conran Cove Island Resort）是一家大型综合性生态旅游度假村，坐落于布里斯班以南的黄金海岸，属于澳大利亚昆士兰州。

structure.text: Conran Cove Island Resort
is
a large integrated ecotourism-based resort
located south of Brisbane on the Gold Coast, Queensland. Australia
south of Brisbane on the Gold Coast

difficult_points: located south of...是过去分词短语，修饰 resort，说明度假村的地理位置。
Queensland. Australia 之间原文以句号误断，实际是同一地点的并列说明，即“昆士兰州，澳大利亚”。

sentences.sentence: As the world's population becomes increasingly urbanised, the demand for tourist attractions which are environmentally friendly, serene and offer amenities of a unique nature has grown rapidly.
sentences.translation: 随着世界人口日益城市化，人们对环保、宁静并提供独特设施的旅游景点的需求迅速增长。

structure.text: As the world's population becomes increasingly urbanised
the demand for tourist attractions
which are environmentally friendly, serene and offer amenities of a unique nature
has grown rapidly

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示“随着……”。
which 引导定语从句修饰 tourist attractions，从句内 are 和 offer 并列作谓语。

sentences.sentence: Couran Cove Resort, which is one such tourist attractions, is located on South Stradbroke Island, occupying approximately 150 hectares of the island.
sentences.translation: 库兰湾度假村（Couran Cove Resort）就是这样一处旅游景点，坐落于南斯特拉布罗克岛上，占地约150公顷。

structure.text: Couran Cove Resort
which is one such tourist attractions
is located on South Stradbroke Island
occupying approximately 150 hectares of the island

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Couran Cove Resort 的性质。
occupying...是现在分词短语作伴随状语，说明该度假村的占地面积。

sentences.sentence: South Stradbroke Island is separated from die mainland by the Broadwater, a stretch of sea .' kilometres wide.
sentences.translation: 南斯特拉布罗克岛与大陆之间隔着布罗德沃特水域（the Broadwater），这片海域宽约数公里。

structure.text: South Stradbroke Island
is separated from die mainland
by the Broadwater
a stretch of sea .' kilometres wide

difficult_points: be separated from...by...表示“被……与……隔开”，by 引出隔开两地的事物。
a stretch of sea .' kilometres wide 是对 the Broadwater 的同位语说明，原文数字部分转录残缺。

sentences.sentence: More than a century ago. there was only one Stradbroke Island, and there were at least four Aboriginal tribes living and limiting on the island.
sentences.translation: 一个多世纪以前，斯特拉布罗克岛还只是一座岛屿，当时岛上至少居住着四个原住民部落。

structure.text: More than a century ago.
there was only one Stradbroke Island
and there were at least four Aboriginal tribes
living and limiting on the island

difficult_points: More than a century ago. there 之间的句号是转录误差，原意为逗号，引出时间状语后接主句。
living and limiting on the island 是现在分词短语，修饰 tribes，说明部落在岛上生活的状态。

sentences.sentence: Regrettably, most of the original island dwellers were eventually killed by diseases such as tuberculosis, smallpox and influenza by the end of the 19th century.
sentences.translation: 遗憾的是，到19世纪末，原住岛民中的大多数最终死于肺结核、天花和流感等疾病。

structure.text: Regrettably
most of the original island dwellers
were eventually killed by diseases
such as tuberculosis, smallpox and influenza
by the end of the 19th century

difficult_points: were killed by 是被动语态，diseases 是造成死亡的施加者。
such as...列举导致岛民死亡的具体疾病类型。

sentences.sentence: The second ship wrecked on the island in 1894, and the subsequent destruction of the ship (the Cambus Wallace) because it contained dynamite, caused a large crater in the sandhills on Stradbroke Island.
sentences.translation: 1894年，第二艘船只在岛上失事，随后由于船上装有炸药，该船（坎巴斯·华莱士号，the Cambus Wallace）发生爆炸，在斯特拉布罗克岛的沙丘上炸出一个大坑。

structure.text: The second ship wrecked on the island in 1894
and the subsequent destruction of the ship
(the Cambus Wallace)
because it contained dynamite
caused a large crater in the sandhills on Stradbroke Island

difficult_points: and 连接两个并列分句：第一艘船失事，以及随后该船被毁一事。
because it contained dynamite 是原因状语从句，插入在主语和谓语 caused 之间，解释被毁的原因。
(the Cambus Wallace) 是对 the ship 的同位语补充，说明船名。

sentences.sentence: Eventually. the ocean bloke through the weakened land form and Stradbroke became two islands.
sentences.translation: 最终，海水冲破了这片被削弱的地貌，斯特拉布罗克岛因此分裂成两座岛屿。

structure.text: Eventually.
the ocean bloke through the weakened land form
and Stradbroke became two islands

difficult_points: Eventually. the 之间的句号为转录误差，实际起连接状语与主句的作用。
bloke 在原文中为 broke 的转录误差，此处意为“冲破”。

sentences.sentence: Conran Cove Island Resort is built on one of the world's lew naturally -occurring sand lands, which is home to a wide range of plant communities and one of the largest remaining remnants of the rare livistona rainforest left on the Gold Coast.
sentences.translation: 科兰湾岛度假村建在世界上少数几处天然形成的沙地之一，这里孕育着种类丰富的植物群落，也是黄金海岸现存最大的珍稀利维斯顿榈雨林遗迹之一。

structure.text: Conran Cove Island Resort
is built on one of the world's lew naturally -occurring sand lands
which is home to a wide range of plant communities and one of the largest remaining remnants of the rare livistona rainforest left on the Gold Coast
left on the Gold Coast

difficult_points: one of the world's...sand lands 中 lew 为 few 的转录误差，意为“世界上少数几处天然沙地之一”。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，从句谓语 is home to 后接两个并列宾语：a wide range of plant communities 和 one of the largest remaining remnants...。
left on the Gold Coast 是过去分词短语，修饰 remnants，表示“遗留在黄金海岸的”。

sentences.sentence: Many mangrove and rainforest areas, and Malaleuca Wetlands on South Stradbroke Island (and in Queensland), have been cleared, drained or filled for residential, industrial, agricultural or urban development in the first half of the 20th century.
sentences.translation: 在20世纪上半叶，南斯特拉布罗克岛（以及昆士兰州其他地区）的许多红树林、雨林地带和白千层湿地，都因住宅、工业、农业或城市开发而被清除、排干或填埋。

structure.text: Many mangrove and rainforest areas, and Malaleuca Wetlands on South Stradbroke Island (and in Queensland)
have been cleared, drained or filled
for residential, industrial, agricultural or urban development
in the first half of the 20th century

difficult_points: have been cleared, drained or filled 是现在完成时的被动语态，三个过去分词并列作表语。
for...development 说明清除、排干或填埋土地的目的。

sentences.sentence: Farmers and graziers finally abandoned South Stradbroke Island in 1959 because the vegetation and the soil conditions there were not suitable for agricultural activities.
sentences.translation: 由于当地的植被和土壤条件不适合从事农业活动，农民和牧场主最终于1959年放弃了南斯特拉布罗克岛。

structure.text: Farmers and graziers
finally abandoned South Stradbroke Island in 1959
because the vegetation and the soil conditions there were not suitable for agricultural activities

difficult_points: because 引导原因状语从句，解释农民放弃该岛的原因。
there 是地点副词，指代 South Stradbroke Island。

sentences.sentence: SUSTAINABLE PRACTICES OF COUKAN COVE RESORT
sentences.translation: 库兰湾度假村的可持续实践

structure.text: SUSTAINABLE PRACTICES OF COUKAN COVE RESORT

difficult_points: COUKAN COVE RESORT 为 Couran Cove Resort 的转录变体，指代同一度假村。
标题采用无动词的名词短语结构，概括该段落主题——度假村的可持续实践。

sentences.sentence: Being located on an offshore island, the resort is only accessible by means of water transport.
sentences.translation: 由于坐落在近海岛屿上，该度假村只能通过水路交通抵达。

structure.text: Being located on an offshore island
the resort
is only accessible by means of water transport

difficult_points: Being located...是现在分词短语作原因状语，相当于 Because it is located on an offshore island。
by means of 引出到达度假村所依靠的方式。

sentences.sentence: The resort provides hourly ferry service from the marina on the mainland to and from the island.
sentences.translation: 度假村提供从大陆码头往返该岛的每小时一班渡轮服务。

structure.text: The resort
provides hourly ferry service
from the marina on the mainland to and from the island

difficult_points: from the marina on the mainland 说明渡轮服务的出发地点。
to and from the island 表示“往返该岛”，to 和 from 分别指去程和回程。

expressions.meaning_zh: 每小时一班的渡轮服务

sentences.sentence: Within the resort. transport modes include walking trails, bicycle tracks and the beach train.
sentences.translation: 在度假村内部，交通方式包括步行小径、自行车道和海滩小火车。

structure.text: Within the resort.
transport modes
include walking trails, bicycle tracks and the beach train

difficult_points: Within the resort. transport 之间的句号为转录误差，原意为逗号，引出地点状语。
include 后接三个并列宾语，列举度假村内部的交通方式。

sentences.sentence: The reception area is the counter of the shop which has not changed for 8 years at least.
sentences.translation: 接待区就是商店的柜台，这个柜台至少八年没有变过。

structure.text: The reception area
is the counter of the shop
which has not changed for 8 years at least

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，修饰 the counter of the shop，说明其长期未变。
for 8 years at least 表示“至少八年”，强调持续时间之长。

sentences.sentence: The accommodation is an octagonal "Bure''.
sentences.translation: 住宿是一种八角形的“布雷”式小屋（Bure）。

structure.text: The accommodation
is an octagonal "Bure''

difficult_points: Bure 是传统茅草屋的名称，此处指度假村采用的八角形小屋式客房。
octagonal 是形容词，修饰 Bure，说明其八角形的建筑形状。

sentences.sentence: These are large rooms that are clean but the equipment is tiled and in some cases just working.
sentences.translation: 这些房间面积很大，也很干净，但设备有些陈旧，有些甚至勉强能用。

structure.text: These
are large rooms
that are clean
but the equipment is tiled and in some cases just working

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 rooms，说明房间干净的特点。
but 连接转折关系，说明房间虽大且干净，但设备状况欠佳。
just working 表示设备“勉强能用”，暗含性能不佳。

sentences.sentence: Our ceiling fan only worked on high speed for example.
sentences.translation: 比如，我们的吊扇只能开高速档运转。

structure.text: Our ceiling fan
only worked on high speed
for example

difficult_points: only worked on high speed 表示吊扇只有高速档可用，暗示设备老旧、功能受限。
for example 置于句末，举例说明上句提到的设备问题。

sentences.sentence: Beds are hard but clean.
sentences.translation: 床铺很硬，但很干净。

structure.text: Beds
are hard but clean

difficult_points: hard 和 clean 由 but 连接，形成对比：床硬但干净。
but 在此表示转折，弱化前一特点带来的负面印象。

sentences.sentence: There is a television, a radio, an old air conditioner and a small fridge.
sentences.translation: 房间里有一台电视、一台收音机、一台旧空调和一个小冰箱。

structure.text: There is a television, a radio, an old air conditioner and a small fridge

difficult_points: There is 存在句结构，后接四个并列名词短语，列举房间内的设施。
old 和 small 分别修饰 air conditioner 和 fridge，暗示设备较为陈旧简陋。

sentences.sentence: These "Bures" are right on top of each other and night noises do carry. so he careful what you say and do.
sentences.translation: 这些“布雷”小屋彼此紧挨着，夜里的声音很容易传过去，所以说话做事都要小心。

structure.text: These "Bures"
are right on top of each other
and night noises do carry
so he careful what you say and do
what you say and do

difficult_points: right on top of each other 表示小屋之间紧挨在一起，几乎没有间隔。
do carry 中 do 起强调作用，强调噪音确实会传播出去。
so he careful 中 he 为 be 的转录误差，此处是祈使句 so be careful，表示由此得出的提醒。
what you say and do 是宾语从句，指代言行内容。

expressions.text: right on top of each other
be careful what you say and do

sentences.sentence: The only tiling is the mosquitoes, but if you forget to bring mosquito repellant they sell some oil the island.
sentences.translation: 唯一的问题是蚊子，不过如果你忘了带驱蚊剂，岛上也有得卖。

structure.text: The only tiling is the mosquitoes
but if you forget to bring mosquito repellant they sell some oil the island
if you forget to bring mosquito repellant
they sell some oil the island

difficult_points: tiling 为 thing 的转录误差，意为“唯一的问题是蚊子”。
if 引导条件状语从句，说明在何种情况下岛上会提供驱蚊用品。
oil the island 中省略了介词 at，原意为 at the island（在岛上）。

sentences.sentence: As an ecotourism-based resort most of the planning and development of the attraction lias been concentrated on the need lo co-exist with the fragile natural environment of South Stradbroke Island io achieve sustainable development.
sentences.translation: 作为一家生态旅游度假村，该景点的大部分规划与开发工作都集中在如何与南斯特拉布罗克岛脆弱的自然环境共存、以实现可持续发展这一需求上。

structure.text: As an ecotourism-based resort
most of the planning and development of the attraction
lias been concentrated on the need
lo co-exist with the fragile natural environment of South Stradbroke Island
io achieve sustainable development

difficult_points: lias 为 has 的转录误差，has been concentrated on 是现在完成时的被动语态。
lo 和 io 分别为 to 的转录误差，两个不定式短语分别修饰 need 并补充说明共存的目的。
the need to co-exist with...表示“与……共存的需求”，to 引导的不定式作 need 的后置修饰。

sentences.sentence: WATER AND ENERGY MANAGEMENT
sentences.translation: 水与能源管理

structure.text: WATER AND ENERGY MANAGEMENT

difficult_points: water and energy 并列作 management 的定语，说明标题涵盖水和能源两方面的管理。
该标题为无动词的名词短语，用于标示下文段落主题。

sentences.sentence: South Stradbroke Island has groundwater at the centre of the island, which has a maximum height of 3 metres above sea level.
sentences.translation: 南斯特拉布罗克岛的中心地带蕴藏着地下水，其最高水位高出海平面3米。

structure.text: South Stradbroke Island
has groundwater at the centre of the island
which has a maximum height of 3 metres above sea level

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面的 groundwater，说明其最高水位。
above sea level 表示“高出海平面”，是常见的高度表达方式。

sentences.sentence: The water supply is recharged by rainfall and is commonly known as an unconfined freshwater aquifer.
sentences.translation: 该水源由降雨补给，通常被称为无压淡水含水层。

structure.text: The water supply
is recharged by rainfall
and is commonly known as an unconfined freshwater aquifer

difficult_points: is recharged by 和 is known as 是并列的被动语态谓语，共用主语 The water supply。
unconfined freshwater aquifer 是专业术语，指“无压（潜水）淡水含水层”。

sentences.sentence: Couran Cove Island Resort obtains its water supply by tapping into this aquifer and extracting it via a bore system.
sentences.translation: 库兰湾岛度假村通过钻入该含水层并利用钻孔系统抽取地下水，来获取自身的水源供应。

structure.text: Couran Cove Island Resort
obtains its water supply
by tapping into this aquifer and extracting it via a bore system
tapping into this aquifer
extracting it via a bore system

difficult_points: by 后接两个并列的动名词短语 tapping into...和 extracting...，说明获取水源的具体方式。
it 指代从含水层中抽取出的地下水。

sentences.sentence: Some of the problems which have threatened the island's freshwater supply include pollution, contamination and over-consumption.
sentences.translation: 威胁该岛淡水供应的一些问题包括污染、水质污染和过度消耗。

structure.text: Some of the problems
which have threatened the island's freshwater supply
include pollution, contamination and over-consumption

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，修饰 problems，说明这些问题对淡水供应构成的威胁。
include 后接三个并列名词，列举具体问题类型。

sentences.sentence: In order to minimise some of these problems, all laundry activities are carried out on the mainland.
sentences.translation: 为了尽量减少这些问题，所有洗衣活动都安排在大陆上进行。

structure.text: In order to minimise some of these problems
all laundry activities
are carried out on the mainland

difficult_points: In order to 引导目的状语，说明将洗衣安排在大陆的原因。
are carried out 是被动语态，强调洗衣活动被安排实施的方式。

sentences.sentence: The resort considers washing machines as onerous to the island's freshwater supply, and that the detergents contain a high level of phosphates which are a major source of water pollution.
sentences.translation: 度假村认为洗衣机会给该岛的淡水供应带来沉重负担，而且洗涤剂含有高浓度的磷酸盐，这是水污染的主要来源之一。

structure.text: The resort
considers washing machines as onerous to the island's freshwater supply
and that the detergents contain a high level of phosphates
which are a major source of water pollution

difficult_points: consider...as...表示“认为……是……”，onerous 意为“繁重的、造成负担的”。
and that 后的从句与前面的 as onerous 结构不完全对称，可理解为省略了 considers，即“也认为……”。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 phosphates，说明其对水污染的影响。

sentences.sentence: The resort uses LPG-power generation rather than a diesel-powered plant for its energy supply, supplemented by wind turbine, which has reduced greenhouse emissions by 70% of diesel-equivalent generation methods.
sentences.translation: 度假村使用液化石油气（LPG）发电而非柴油发电厂来供应能源，并辅以风力发电机，与同等柴油发电方式相比，温室气体排放量减少了70%。

structure.text: The resort
uses LPG-power generation rather than a diesel-powered plant
for its energy supply
supplemented by wind turbine
which has reduced greenhouse emissions by 70% of diesel-equivalent generation methods

difficult_points: rather than 表示“而不是”，对比 LPG 发电与柴油发电两种方式。
supplemented by 是过去分词短语，修饰整个前述发电方式，说明还辅以风力发电。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前述发电方式，说明其减排效果。

sentences.sentence: Excess heat recovered from the generator is used to heat the swimming pool.
sentences.translation: 从发电机中回收的多余热量被用来给游泳池加热。

structure.text: Excess heat
recovered from the generator
is used to heat the swimming pool

difficult_points: recovered from the generator 是过去分词短语，修饰 Excess heat，说明热量的来源。
is used to heat 是被动语态，to heat 表示热量被利用的目的。

sentences.sentence: Hot water in the eco-cabins and for some of the resort's vehicles are solar-powered.
sentences.translation: 生态小屋的热水以及部分度假村车辆使用的能源，均为太阳能驱动。

structure.text: Hot water in the eco-cabins and for some of the resort's vehicles
are solar-powered

difficult_points: in the eco-cabins 和 for some of the resort's vehicles 并列修饰 Hot water，说明太阳能应用的两个场景。
are solar-powered 中谓语用复数形式 are，是因为主语实际涵盖了两类用途。

sentences.sentence: Water efficient fittings are also installed in showers and toilets.
sentences.translation: 淋浴间和卫生间还安装了节水装置。

structure.text: Water efficient fittings
are also installed in showers and toilets

difficult_points: Water efficient fittings 是复合形容词修饰名词的结构，意为“节水型装置”。
are installed 是被动语态，强调装置被安装这一动作。

sentences.sentence: However, not all the appliances used by the resort arc energy efficient, such as refrigerators.
sentences.translation: 然而，度假村使用的电器并非全都节能，比如冰箱就是如此。

structure.text: However
not all the appliances
used by the resort
arc energy efficient
such as refrigerators

difficult_points: not all 表示部分否定，意为“并非所有”，而非“全部都不”。
used by the resort 是过去分词短语，修饰 appliances，说明这些电器为度假村所使用。
arc 为 are 的转录误差，谓语应理解为 are energy efficient。

sentences.sentence: Visitors who stay at the resort are encouraged to monitor their water and energy usage via the in-house television systems, and are rewarded with prizes (such as a free return trip to the resort) accordingly if their usage level is low.
sentences.translation: 入住度假村的游客被鼓励通过内部电视系统监测自己的水电使用情况，如果使用量较低，还会相应获得奖励（比如一次免费的度假村往返旅行）。

structure.text: Visitors
who stay at the resort
are encouraged to monitor their water and energy usage via the in-house television systems
and are rewarded with prizes
(such as a free return trip to the resort)
accordingly if their usage level is low

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 Visitors，限定“入住度假村的”游客。
are encouraged to...和 are rewarded with...是并列的被动语态谓语，共用主语 Visitors。
if their usage level is low 是条件状语从句，说明获得奖励的前提条件。

sentences.sentence: CONCLUDING REMARKS
sentences.translation: 结语

structure.text: CONCLUDING REMARKS

difficult_points: concluding 是现在分词作定语，修饰 remarks，意为“总结性的话语”。
该标题为无动词的名词短语，用于标示文章总结部分的开始。

sentences.sentence: We examined a case study of good management practice and a pro-active sustainable tourism stance of an eco-resort.
sentences.translation: 我们考察了一个关于良好管理实践以及某生态度假村积极践行可持续旅游立场的案例研究。

structure.text: We
examined a case study
of good management practice and a pro-active sustainable tourism stance of an eco-resort

difficult_points: of 后接两个并列名词短语，说明案例研究涉及的两方面内容：管理实践与可持续旅游立场。
pro-active 修饰 stance，表示“积极主动的”立场。

sentences.sentence: In three years of operation, Couran Cove Island Resort has won 23 international and national awards, including the 2001 Australian Tourism Award in the 4-Star Accommodation category.
sentences.translation: 在运营的三年间，库兰湾岛度假村共获得23项国际和国内奖项，其中包括2001年澳大利亚旅游奖“四星级住宿”类别奖项。

structure.text: In three years of operation
Couran Cove Island Resort
has won 23 international and national awards
including the 2001 Australian Tourism Award in the 4-Star Accommodation category

difficult_points: has won 是现在完成时，强调从开业至今累计获得的奖项数量。
including 引出具体奖项实例，对前面的 23 awards 进行举例说明。

sentences.sentence: The resort has embraced and has effectively implemented contem porary environmental management practices.
sentences.translation: 度假村已经接受并有效落实了当代的环境管理实践。

structure.text: The resort
has embraced and has effectively implemented contem porary environmental management practices

difficult_points: has embraced 和 has effectively implemented 是并列的现在完成时谓语，共用宾语 contem porary environmental management practices。
contem porary 为 contemporary 的转录误差，意为“当代的”。

sentences.sentence: It has been argued that the successful implemen tation of the principles of sustainability should promote long-term social, economic and envi ronmental benefits, while ensuring and enhancing the prospects of continued viability for the tourism enterprise.
sentences.translation: 有观点认为，成功落实可持续发展原则应能带来长期的社会、经济和环境效益，同时确保并提升该旅游企业持续经营的前景。

structure.text: It has been argued
that the successful implemen tation of the principles of sustainability should promote long-term social, economic and envi ronmental benefits
the successful implemen tation of the principles of sustainability
should promote long-term social, economic and envi ronmental benefits
while ensuring and enhancing the prospects of continued viability for the tourism enterprise

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正内容是 that 引导的宾语从句。
implemen tation 和 envi ronmental 均为转录时单词被拆分产生的误差，应分别理解为 implementation 和 environmental。
while ensuring and enhancing...是现在分词短语作伴随状语，说明落实可持续原则的同时带来的效果。

sentences.sentence: Couran Cove Island Resort does not conform to the characteristics of the Resort Development Spectrum, as proposed by Pridcaux (2000).
sentences.translation: 库兰湾岛度假村并不符合普里多（Pridcaux，2000）提出的“度假村发展谱系”的特征。

structure.text: Couran Cove Island Resort
does not conform to the characteristics of the Resort Development Spectrum
as proposed by Pridcaux (2000)

difficult_points: does not conform to 表示“不符合”，否定该度假村符合某一发展模型的特征。
as proposed by...是过去分词短语，补充说明 Resort Development Spectrum 这一概念的提出者及年份。

sentences.sentence: According to Pridcaux. the resort should be at least at Phase 3 of the model (the National tourism phase), which describes an integrated resort providing 3-4 star hotel-type accommodation.
sentences.translation: 根据普里多的观点，该度假村至少应处于该模型的第三阶段（即“国家旅游阶段”），这一阶段指的是提供三至四星级酒店式住宿的综合性度假村。

structure.text: According to Pridcaux.
the resort
should be at least at Phase 3 of the model
(the National tourism phase)
which describes an integrated resort
providing 3-4 star hotel-type accommodation

difficult_points: According to Pridcaux. the 之间的句号为转录误差，原意为逗号，引出观点来源。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Phase 3 of the model，进一步解释该阶段的定义。
providing...是现在分词短语，修饰 an integrated resort，说明其住宿档次。

sentences.sentence: The primary tourist market in Phase 3 of the model consists mainly of interstate visitors.
sentences.translation: 该模型第三阶段的主要旅游市场，构成人群主要是州际游客。

structure.text: The primary tourist market in Phase 3 of the model
consists mainly of interstate visitors

difficult_points: consist mainly of 表示“主要由……构成”，说明该阶段游客的主要来源。
interstate visitors 指“州际游客”，即来自本国其他州的游客。

sentences.sentence: However, the number of interstate and international tourists visiting the resort is small, with the principal visitor markets com prising locals and residents front nearby towns and the Gold Coast region.
sentences.translation: 然而，前往该度假村的州际及国际游客数量较少，主要游客群体是当地居民以及来自附近城镇和黄金海岸地区的居民。

structure.text: the number of interstate and international tourists
visiting the resort
is small
with the principal visitor markets com prising locals and residents front nearby towns and the Gold Coast region
com prising locals and residents front nearby towns and the Gold Coast region

difficult_points: visiting the resort 是现在分词短语，修饰 tourists，说明其到访该度假村这一行为。
with 引导独立主格结构，补充说明游客市场的主要构成。
com prising 和 front 分别为 comprising 和 from 的转录误差，意为“由……构成”和“来自”。

sentences.sentence: The carrying capacity of Couran Cove does not seem to be of any concern to the Resort management.
sentences.translation: 度假村管理方似乎并不关心库兰湾的承载能力问题。

structure.text: The carrying capacity of Couran Cove
does not seem to be of any concern to the Resort management

difficult_points: does not seem to be of any concern to 表示“似乎并不为……所关心”，management 是关心的对象。
carrying capacity 是生态旅游领域术语，指环境或设施可承受的游客承载量。

sentences.sentence: Given that it is a private commercial ecotourist enterprise, regulating the number of visitors to the resort to minimise damage done to the natural environment on South Stradbrokc Island is not a binding constraint.
sentences.translation: 鉴于该度假村是一家私营商业性生态旅游企业，通过限制游客数量来减少对南斯特拉布罗克岛自然环境造成的破坏，并不是一项强制性约束。

structure.text: Given that it is a private commercial ecotourist enterprise
regulating the number of visitors to the resort
to minimise damage done to the natural environment on South Stradbrokc Island
done to the natural environment on South Stradbrokc Island
is not a binding constraint

difficult_points: Given that...是条件状语从句，意为“鉴于、既然”。
regulating the number of visitors...是动名词短语作主语，指“限制游客数量”这一做法。
to minimise damage...是不定式短语作目的状语，说明限制游客数量的目的。

sentences.sentence: However, the Resort's growth will eventually be constrained by its carrying capacity, and quantity control should be incorporated in the management strategy of the resort.
sentences.translation: 然而，该度假村的发展最终将受到其承载能力的制约，因此数量管控应被纳入度假村的管理战略之中。

structure.text: the Resort's growth
will eventually be constrained by its carrying capacity
and quantity control should be incorporated in the management strategy of the resort

difficult_points: will be constrained by 是将来时被动语态，说明发展会受到承载能力的制约。
should be incorporated in 是被动语态，表示“应被纳入……之中”。
